_instructions: Fill in after each match. home_goals_90/away_goals_90 are the score after 90 minutes of regulation ONLY (before extra time). 'advanced' is the team that progressed (or won, for TPP/F), needed for the +1 advance bonus. Leave null until known; score.py skips null matches. Add a source URL in 'source' for the record.

QF3.source: England won 2-1 in extra time (Bellingham 2); 1-1 after 90'. https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-bracket-schedule-scores-results-live-updates-quarterfinals-203257966.html
